name: Partial Reprogramming Coverage Repair for June 12, 2026
summary: Coverage-repair bundle staging Partial Reprogramming source, study, finding, registry-watch, review, safety-boundary, seminal-anchor, and outlook-support records. The proposed outlook refresh keeps the track at low-confidence animal_signal with accelerating momentum, updates the human boundary to no human outcomes evidence, and adds ER-100 as a no-results phase 1 trial-watch item.

scope.question: Which known source-completeness gaps for Partial Reprogramming need repair, and does resolving them change the coverage verdict or public boundaries?

proposed_changes.summary: Add Ocampo 2016 cyclic OSKM source.
proposed_changes.rationale: Repair the missing seminal animal anchor for Partial Reprogramming.

proposed_changes.summary: Add Lu 2020 OSK retinal reprogramming source.
proposed_changes.rationale: Represent tissue-specific animal functional evidence and epigenetic restoration.

proposed_changes.summary: Add Browder 2022 physiological-aging mouse source.
proposed_changes.rationale: Repair molecular and biomarker support for longer-term partial reprogramming in wild-type mice.

proposed_changes.summary: Add Macip 2024 AAV OSK aged-mouse lifespan source.
proposed_changes.rationale: Represent later aged-mouse lifespan and frailty evidence with explicit limitations.

proposed_changes.summary: Add Sahu 2024 Cdkn2a-OSK targeted partial-reprogramming source.
proposed_changes.rationale: Represent recent targeted delivery, lifespan, health-marker, and tumor-incidence boundary evidence.

proposed_changes.summary: Add Abad 2013 full-reprogramming safety boundary source.
proposed_changes.rationale: Repair the tumorigenicity and taxonomy-boundary gap for over-reprogramming risk.

proposed_changes.summary: Add Toraason 2024 model-organism limiting source.
proposed_changes.rationale: Represent a small negative/null generalization boundary for reprogramming-factor orthologs.

proposed_changes.summary: Add Li 2026 partial reprogramming review source.
proposed_changes.rationale: Repair recent-review triangulation and translation checklist coverage.

proposed_changes.summary: Add the ER-100 phase 1 ClinicalTrials.gov registry source.
proposed_changes.rationale: Repair active human registry coverage and update the public boundary from no human program to no human outcomes evidence.

proposed_changes.summary: Add the Ocampo cyclic OSKM animal study.
proposed_changes.rationale: Map the main animal lifespan, healthspan, function, and biomarker anchor.

proposed_changes.summary: Add the Lu OSK retinal animal study.
proposed_changes.rationale: Map tissue-specific animal functional and mechanistic evidence.

proposed_changes.summary: Add the Browder physiological-aging animal study.
proposed_changes.rationale: Map longer-term biomarker and safety-relevant mouse evidence.

proposed_changes.summary: Add the Macip AAV OSK aged-mouse lifespan study.
proposed_changes.rationale: Map a later aged-mouse lifespan and frailty signal.

proposed_changes.summary: Add the Sahu Cdkn2a-OSK targeted mouse study.
proposed_changes.rationale: Map recent targeted delivery, mouse lifespan, safety, and human-cell context.

proposed_changes.summary: Add the Abad in vivo full-reprogramming safety study.
proposed_changes.rationale: Map tumorigenicity and dedifferentiation boundary evidence.

proposed_changes.summary: Add the Toraason model-organism limiting study.
proposed_changes.rationale: Map negative/null model-organism context for generalization boundaries.

proposed_changes.summary: Add the Li and Tay review study record.
proposed_changes.rationale: Map recent review triangulation and translation-limitation context.

proposed_changes.summary: Add the ER-100 optic-neuropathy phase 1 study.
proposed_changes.rationale: Map the current human no-results trial-watch entry for Partial Reprogramming.

proposed_changes.summary: Add the cyclic OSKM animal lifespan and recovery finding.
proposed_changes.rationale: Anchor the animal_signal stage in a concrete source-backed finding.

proposed_changes.summary: Add the OSK retinal functional animal finding.
proposed_changes.rationale: Represent tissue-specific functional support without overgeneralizing it.

proposed_changes.summary: Add the long-term OSKM mouse biomarker finding.
proposed_changes.rationale: Represent physiologic-aging biomarker and mechanism support.

proposed_changes.summary: Add the AAV OSK aged-mouse lifespan finding.
proposed_changes.rationale: Map a later animal lifespan signal with confidence and conflict caveats.

proposed_changes.summary: Add the Cdkn2a-targeted OSK mouse lifespan and safety finding.
proposed_changes.rationale: Represent targeted delivery, health-marker, and tumor-incidence boundary evidence.

proposed_changes.summary: Add the full-reprogramming teratoma safety finding.
proposed_changes.rationale: Make safety and taxonomy boundaries explicit in the evidence map.

proposed_changes.summary: Add the C. elegans limiting finding.
proposed_changes.rationale: Represent a negative/null model-organism generalization boundary.

proposed_changes.summary: Add the review-based safety and delivery checklist finding.
proposed_changes.rationale: Repair recent-review triangulation and translation-boundary support.

proposed_changes.summary: Add the ER-100 recruiting no-results trial-watch finding.
proposed_changes.rationale: Represent the current human registry boundary without treating it as efficacy evidence.

proposed_changes.summary: Refresh the Partial Reprogramming outlook support map and human boundary wording.
proposed_changes.rationale: Keep the public stage at animal_signal while making the animal anchors, safety limits, review triangulation, and ER-100 no-results registry auditable.

proposed_outlook_implications.note: Keep evidence_stage at low-confidence animal_signal and momentum accelerating. Update the human boundary from no direct human intervention evidence to no human outcomes evidence, with ER-100 recorded as a recruiting phase 1 no-results registry.

next_actions: Run source-fidelity review against the staged PubMed and ClinicalTrials.gov records, especially effect-size, model, sex, delivery, conflict, and safety details.

Run interpretation and taxonomy review to confirm the human boundary, ER-100 trial-watch framing, and separation from full reprogramming, stem-cell replacement, generic gene therapy, and epigenetic-clock-only claims.

If approved and published, return Partial Reprogramming to ordinary surveillance with special watch on NCT07290244 results, ER-100 updates, and independent replication of the 2024 mouse lifespan and safety signals.
